creator: admin@vonitsanet.gr
text:
I am sorry if this is the wrong place to report this but the port 'teamspeak3-server' is out of date.

The latest version is 3.0.7.2  while the port feches 3.0.7.1

3.0.7.2 includes a new security option to prevent DoS and it should be updated when possible.

http://teamspeak.com/?page=downloads
